data.title: Content Delivery Network (CDN)
data.description: Global network to distribute content with high availability and performance.
data.technical_spec: CDNs like Akamai or AWS CloudFront help improve load times and reliability.

data.title: Microservices Architecture
data.description: System design with individual services designed for specific business functions.
data.technical_spec: Utilizes RESTful APIs and cloud infrastructure.

data.title: Responsive Design
data.description: Ensures the website layout adjusts dynamically to various screen sizes.
data.technical_spec: Implemented using CSS media queries and flexible grid systems.

data.title: SSL/TLS Encryption
data.description: Secures data transfer between users and the website.
data.technical_spec: Uses TLS 1.3 for optimal encryption standards.

data.title: Progressive Web App (PWA) Features
data.description: Blend of web and mobile app features for enhanced user experience.
data.technical_spec: Service workers, web app manifest, and app-like interactions.
